src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate from deprecated OAuth2AuthorizationServerConfigurer to the new HttpSecurity.oauth2AuthorizationServer DSL required by Spring Security 6.5+.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: The class OAuth2AuthorizationServerConfigurer and the method HttpSecurity.apply() for this configurer are removed in Spring Security 6.5+, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Replace custom OidcUserInfo mapper configuration with the new OIDC customization DSL.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: The old OIDC configuration methods on OAuth2AuthorizationServerConfigurer are removed; the new API requires using the nested builder within oauth2AuthorizationServer.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Update security matcher definition to use the new string-based matcher or the provided endpoints matcher from the new DSL.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: The old RequestMatcher usage pattern is deprecated/removed in favor of the new DSL structure in Spring Security 6.5+.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate login redirect configuration to the new exceptionHandling DSL.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: The old formLogin configuration for authorization server endpoints is replaced by explicit exception handling in the new Spring Security 6.5+ API.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate OAuth2 Resource Server JWT configuration to the new DSL.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: The method reference style for oauth2ResourceServer configuration is removed in favor of the lambda-based DSL in Spring Security 6.5+.

Replace manual SimpleCacheManager with CaffeineCacheManager to use Spring's native Caffeine integration.

Add logic to handle cache entries with zero or negative TTL by omitting expiration settings.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: Compile error: package com.fasterxml.jackson.databind does not exist (or similar) because Spring Boot 3.5 uses tools.jackson as the default Jackson provider, removing the com.fasterxml.jackson facade or redirecting it.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Replace com.fasterxml.jackson imports with tools.jackson imports to align with Spring Boot 3.5's migration to Jackson 2.18+ (tools.jackson).

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Replace the deprecated requestMatcher() or implicit context with explicit securityMatcher() to define the filter chain scope in Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: Spring Security 6 requires explicit securityMatcher() or requestMatcher() on HttpSecurity to define the scope of the filter chain; implicit defaults may cause runtime errors or compilation issues depending on version strictness.
